meaning: n.佩洛通玻璃(一种欧洲装饰玻璃,亦作 peloton glass)
examples: The peloton covers stage four July 7 in Reims, France.
The French still turned out to cheer the peloton in July. America’s ballparks are full.
The peloton -- the main group of cyclists in a race -- rides along in stage six of the Tour de France in Gueugnon, France, on July 9.
Anyone trying to dodge their share will get filthy looks from the rest of the peloton.
With 4km remaining, the peloton reeled in a group of six riders and Nicki Sorensen launched an attack.
